title: • Avoid forced output
content:
• Avoid forced output
Evening / Neutral Window (often post-3PM) • Time decisions here
• Speak to AI
• Make calls
• Say yes/no
✍️ EMOTIONAL CLARITY LOG
Track your wave daily using:
| Time | Emotional State | Event | Energy (1–5) | Aligned? (Y/N) | Notes | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | | | | | | |
Over time, this builds your emotional mapping algorithm —you’ll begin to recognize your clarity windows with precision.
💡 DECISION RITUALS
Ritual Name
Action
Purpose
“Wait the Wave”
Delay all major yes/no for at least one full sleep cycle
Prevent snap misalignment
“Signal the Surge”
Label the emotion (e.g. “This is a creative high, not truth”)
Detach emotion from meaning
“Low Doesn’t Mean No”
Don’t confuse low energy with wrong direction
Protect aligned vision during dips
“Neutral Bell”
Create a sound, symbol, or gesture to signal when you feel true neutrality
Anchor clarity into body
🎭 CREATIVE FUNCTION OF EMOTIONAL AUTHORITY
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 29 (chunk 29/57)
